name: Being Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Being Holdings Co., Ltd. provides logistics consulting services. The company offers third party logistics services. It also provides passenger transportation, dispatch small taxis and large buses, and create sightseeing plans, as well as various transportation spaces such as chartered sightseeing taxis, VIP hire, wedding hire, and location bus. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Kanazawa, Japan.
